title: data-us pack=regime-pack output
description: Pack output for `data-us/scripts/pack.py --pack regime-pack`. No ticker dimension — fetches FRED macro indicator groups for US regime diagnosis. Tier A (FRED CSV, official Fed primary source). Groups: rates / inflation / growth / nowcast / wei / real_rates / swap_spreads.

groups.description: Indicator groups. Each group bundles related FRED series (e.g. `rates` = T10Y2Y/DGS10/DGS2/FEDFUNDS).

group_payload.description: One FRED indicator group. fred_client.py has two output shapes depending on series count: (a) multi-series — wrapper `{fetched_at, series: {SID: series_payload, ...}}`; (b) single-series — flat series_payload (with `series` as a string FRED ID, plus observations directly at top level). Consumers must distinguish via `typeof series` (string = single, object = multi).

series.description: Map of FRED series ID (e.g. 'DGS10', 'CPIAUCSL') → series payload.

series_payload.description: Single FRED series payload. Note: `series` here is a STRING (the FRED series ID), not an object — distinguishing this shape from multi_series_wrapper.

_source.description: 'csv' (FRED CSV API) or alternate when client falls back.

observations.description: Time-series observations, ascending by date. Date format depends on series frequency (daily / weekly / monthly / quarterly — FRED reports the period-start date).

value.description: Series value in native units (% for yields, index level for CPI, etc.). Null when FRED reports '.'.
